design_philosophy: A 'Control Room' command center for creators to dissect content virality and legal risks. Expose the data through a brutalist, high-density grid. Tension is created through stark contrasts, strict 1px borders, and aggressive accent colors for optimization modes. Reject 'soft' tech aesthetics; embrace a raw, intelligence-dashboard feel.

headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter) for H1/H2. Never center by default. Create tension with extreme weight contrast.

body.usage: Use for data tables, metrics, labels, and secondary text to give a raw, analytical 'developer' feel.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B). Dense, data-heavy, scanable.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4 for dense widgets, p-6 for main sections. Generous negative space between major dashboard blocks.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment. Optical alignment for icons and text.

surface_styles.cards_and_widgets: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). 1px solid borders (border-collapse style when possible), NO drop shadows, sharp corners (rounded-none). Elements should feel like a rigid wireframe.
surface_styles.header: Solid background with a hard 1px bottom border. z-50 fixed.

components.buttons: Sharp corners. High contrast hover states (e.g., hover:bg-black hover:text-white). Focus states must have 2px offset ring.
components.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn UI, but override radius to rounded-none. 1px border. Deep contrast on focus.
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts. Use stark, flat colors without gradients. Solid lines, no soft fills. Data is objective.
components.heatmap: Dense grid of squares (calendar-like or continuous blocks) color-coded from green (safe) to red (risk). 1px border around blocks.
components.badges: Sharp corners. Used for safe/controversial/aggressive modes with their respective accent colors and pure black/white text for contrast.

motion.hover: Instant or 150ms hard transitions. No slow easing. Interactions must feel immediate and absolute.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets (200ms duration, linear or ease-out).
motion.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion by removing all non-essential transforms.

image_urls.description: Avatar for Haters/Fans in Persona Reaction Feed
Avatar for Haters/Fans in Persona Reaction Feed
Avatar for Haters/Fans in Persona Reaction Feed
Avatar for Haters/Fans in Persona Reaction Feed
Google Auth Logo for Login screen. Note: highly recommend using FcGoogle from react-icons/fc over this image if possible.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Text colors over solid red/yellow badges must be checked (use pure black text over yellow, pure white over red).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute with kebab-case (e.g. data-testid="optimization-mode-toggle").

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'IBM Plex Mono' for body/data.
Install icons: Use 'phosphor-icons' (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) for a dense, professional tech look. Use 'react-icons' (yarn add react-icons) for the Google auth icon.
Override default shadcn styles in tailwind config to remove rounded borders (set --radius to 0) and use stark monochrome colors.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid: 1px border-collapse style for widgets without drop shadows.
For the Heatmap, use Shadcn charts or a dense grid of elements colored dynamically from the accents palette.
Ensure the optimization mode toggle (SAFE/CONTROVERSIAL/AGGRESSIVE) dynamically shifts the active UI accent colors.
Never use generic placeholder images; rely strictly on the provided image_urls for the Persona Feed.
Strictly follow the typography scale: don't exceed text-6xl for main headings.
